goal: Fix the real Ask-a-Question TH/EN mismatch: Element/Planet values shown in English to TH users; blank TH cells in story/celtic
symptom: TH question result (generic topic) showed Element/Planet VALUES in English (labels were Thai). A few TH story/celtic cells rendered blank.
root_cause: buildMetaPanel rendered card.element/card.planet raw (English words, no _th data). getLocalizedField returned card[field_th] || '' with no EN fallback, so empty TH cells blanked.
fix: buildMetaPanel now localizes Element (ไฟ/น้ำ/ลม/ดิน) + Planet values for TH via inline maps. getLocalizedField now falls back to the _en field when the localized one is empty (matches the Quick branch; fixes blank story/celtic cells).
verified: Explore parity audit confirmed dict layer 302/302 keys in sync — these were the real gaps
notes: From the TH/EN parity audit (#13). Remaining: 3 aria-labels hardcoded EN (reading.js 579/581/1732, screen-reader only) deferred to avoid colliding with the in-flight reversed-flip worktree agent editing openCardSheet.
